title: All of Evangelion Explained
wikitext:
[]: All of Evangelion Explained             Quote Post by classycrusader01 » Wed Sep 04, 2024 3:38 pm been watching the series since i was 13 (34 now) and deeply into film. Made the video because i havent heard anyone mention certain theories, some that i felt helped make the series make sense, i thought id make a video to help pass it along. So here's All of Evangelion Explained for your consideration https://youtu.be/HNPcyds7xSI?si=IB29RxnnS4IX1MYl

[]: Re: All of Evangelion Explained             Quote Post by Javi2541997 » Fri Sep 06, 2024 3:54 am Thanks for sharing the video and the theories with us, mate. I will watch it later on. One of the main things about Evangelion that I like the most is the opinions and theories shared by the fandom.

[]: Re: All of Evangelion Explained             Quote Post by classycrusader01 » Fri Sep 06, 2024 10:09 am Thanks man really appreciate it, the first segment is for more newbies about the history so if you know all that id skip right to the neon genesis segment and go from there.
